notes:
Fixes the integration panels when Rabbitty is launched from the Dock.

Pull Requests (⌘⇧R) and Jira (⌘⇧J) now find your Homebrew-installed gh / glab / jira CLIs. A Dock-launched app inherits only a minimal PATH, so these panels could report an installed, signed-in CLI as 'not installed' — Rabbitty now resolves each CLI to its real path first. If a panel wrongly showed 'not configured', this is the fix.
